content.doc: findCutoffScore returns the minimum score that qualifies a doc as a landmark given the top cutoffCount docs. If cutoffCount <= 0 it returns +Inf (nothing qualifies). TagGraph represents tag co-occurrence data for incremental updates.
content.name: TagGraph
